mission.title: vault: Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be Configured
mission.description: Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be Configured. Requested by 19+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
It does not appear possible to allowlist fields to be printed in cleartext in the audit logs for requests/responses from the Identity backend.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be…
steps.description:
I didn't expect this to be so simple, but it seems like removing `identity` from the "non tunable" mounts list just works, at least for the audit hmac tuning I've tested.

There may be other impacts I'm not aware of due to this, if y'all can think of any you want me to test for specifically please
```yaml
> vault secrets tune -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids identity
Error tuning secrets engine identity/: Error making API request.

URL: POST http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune
Code: 400. Errors:

* cannot tune "identity/"

> vault write sys/mounts/identity/tune audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids
Error writing data to sys/mounts/identity/tune: Error making API request.

URL: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune
Code: 400. Errors:

* cannot tune "identity/"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Identity Backend Audit HMAC Request/Response Cannot Be…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I didn't expect this to be so simple, but it seems like removing `identity` from the "non tunable" mounts list just works, at least for the audit hmac tuning I've tested.
codeSnippets:
> vault secrets tune -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids -audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids identity
Error tuning secrets engine identity/: Error making API request.

URL: POST http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune
Code: 400. Errors:

* cannot tune "identity/"

> vault write sys/mounts/identity/tune audit-non-hmac-request-keys=member_entity_ids
Error writing data to sys/mounts/identity/tune: Error making API request.

URL: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1/sys/mounts/identity/tune
Code: 400. Errors:

* cannot tune "identity/"
2022-03-24T11:25:17.201-0400 [ERROR] secrets.system.system_fafb1c8d: cannot tune this mount: path=identity/

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
